prestazioni: Engine: 2UR-GSE (5.0L V8) forced induction via HKS GT-SS Supercharger Kit (2.8L rotor, 9.0psi boost, integrated intercooler, and custom ECU calibration for 650whp on 93 octane)

Suspension: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (LC500-specific valving, 30-way adjustable compression/rebound, and 20mm adjustable ride height) paired with Cusco front/rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear)

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2.2-way mechanical, 85% lockup under power) with a ZF 8HP76 transmission tune by Apexi Power FC (rev-matched downshifts, launch control at 4,500 RPM, and 150ms shift times)
estetica: Aero: Varis Japan LC500 widebody kit (carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and duckbill spoiler) with a custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and exposed carbon weave accents

Wheels: Work Meister S1 3P 20x10.5 +25 front / 20x12 +40 rear (custom concave design, 5x114.3 PCD, 5mm spacers for flush fitment) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 front, 315/30/20 rear)

Interior: Bride Zeta III LC500-specific bucket seats (carbon shell, Alcantara/leather upholstery) with Takata 4-point harnesses, a custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede grip), and a full carbon fiber dash overlay by Seibon
